  "claims": [
    "California's aging diesel trains are being exported abroad after retirement, shifting pollution to countries with fewer environmental safeguards.",

    "The majority of greenhouse gas emissions from transportation are carbon dioxide emissions resulting from the combustion of petroleum-based products.",
    "California has high targets for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and is investing in trains that emit fewer greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "Efforts to reduce emissions generally involve replacing locomotives with those that are either zero-emission or lower-emission."
